tests.scenario: Accessing historical data with an expired subscription
steps: Log in with a user account where the premium subscription has expired
Navigate to the 'History' tab
Attempt to open a mood log entry from three months ago
tests.expected_result: The historical log entry is displayed in full without a paywall or upgrade prompt blocking the view.
tests.notes: Revised to ensure accessibility of data regardless of payment status as per Task 5.4.

tests.scenario: Verifying cost transparency on subscription splash screen
steps: Open the 'Go Premium' subscription page
Locate the Annual and Monthly plan cards
Check for the presence of total cycle costs
tests.expected_result: The exact monthly and annual prices are clearly visible on the primary screen without needing to click additional 'details' links.
tests.notes: Added to address budgeter transparency concerns.

steps: Navigate to 'Settings' > 'Language Selection'
Select 'Spanish' from the dropdown menu
Navigate back to the main Dashboard
tests.expected_result: All headings, buttons, and navigation labels are immediately translated into Spanish.
tests.notes: Links to the refined global accessibility requirement.

steps: Add the 'Quick Log' widget to the mobile home screen
Tap a specific mood icon (e.g., Happy) on the widget
Open the main app to check the log history
tests.expected_result: The mood is saved in exactly one tap from the home screen, and the entry appears correctly in the database.
tests.notes: Focuses on the 'under three interactions' constraint.

steps: Initiate a daily check-in flow
Proceed to the primary emotion selection screen
Locate 'Stressed' and 'Overwhelmed' options
tests.expected_result: Both 'Stressed' and 'Overwhelmed' appear as selectable primary buttons.
tests.notes: Ensures the specific vocabulary correction is verified.

steps: Complete at least one educational course during the month
Generate the monthly 'Mental Health Trend Report'
Look for course completion markers on the trend line
tests.expected_result: The report displays a visual correlation between mood improvements and the dates of course completion.
tests.notes: Revised for measurable visual correlation as per hybrid requirements.

tests.scenario: Suppression of frequent app review prompts
steps: Trigger an app review prompt and dismiss it
Simulate 30 days of daily app launches
Check if a review prompt appears on day 31
tests.expected_result: No review request pop-up appears, as the 90-day cooldown period has not elapsed.
tests.notes: Tests the specific timing constraint defined in the refined spec.

steps: Enable Airplane Mode to lose internet connection
Submit a mood log entry with a text note
Re-enable internet connection
tests.expected_result: The app confirms local saving while offline and automatically syncs the entry to the server upon reconnection.
tests.notes: Ensures stability-first users do not lose data during outages.

steps: Select 'Generate Therapy Report'
Input a 4-digit PIN when prompted
Attempt to open the resulting PDF file
tests.expected_result: The PDF viewer requires the 4-digit PIN before the content can be accessed.
tests.notes: Verifies the security constraint for clinical collaboration.

tests.scenario: Professional search performance and data accuracy
steps: Navigate to 'Find a Professional'
Filter by 'Psychologist' and '10km radius'
Measure the time from 'Apply' to results display
tests.expected_result: Matching profiles appear in under 2.0 seconds with badges, phone numbers, and booking buttons visible.
tests.notes: Directly validates the specific performance metrics from the hybrid rewrite.
